extracted_from: Trojan Funds (Ireland) plc Schedule of investments (unaudited) As at 31 January 2025. The schedule groups holdings by country for equities, closed-ended funds, debt securities, and exchange traded certificates.
extraction_notes: The sum of the extracted geographic allocations is 98.73% of NAV, consistent with the sum of 'Total equities' (30.88%) and 'Total debt securities' (67.85%) reported in the document. Derivatives and other net assets/liabilities are not included in this geographic breakdown by issuer country.
